description: Always-approval overlay for Quinn (Sarah's EA). Mirrors the Jeff-side defaults at issue date — Sarah customises this list as her own counterparty graph develops. Initial state: same five categorical forcings (board/investor/regulator/government/legal); Jeff's CBS counterparty IDs and his own profile-flagged domain mapped into Sarah's overlay symmetrically.
notes: Sarah's overlay starts identical in shape to Jeff's. Quinn's audit log will surface where Sarah's preferences diverge once she has been running.
When Sarah's counterparty graph populates (post-onboarding), the counterpartyIds list grows independently of Jeff's.
